_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn ways to communicate respectfully with people from different cultures, using words and actions.

_source.w: We learn ways to communicate respectfully with people from different cultures, using words and actions.
y: Respectful communication helps us build friendships with all kinds of people.
Understanding body language and words helps us avoid misunderstandings.
Good communication across cultures is a skill we need throughout our lives.
eg: We learn greetings in different languages spoken by people in our community.
We explore how body language — like eye contact or personal space — can mean different things.
We practise listening carefully when someone shares about their culture.
We learn that asking respectful questions is a good way to learn about others.
We role-play meeting someone from a different background and practise being welcoming.
We talk about why it is important to use people's names correctly.
